reasoning: The control 3.5.6 requires disabling identifiers after a period of inactivity. In Kubernetes, this can translate to managing service accounts and user access. Ensuring service account tokens have expiration and reviewing user access policies can help meet this requirement. While Kubernetes does not have a direct equivalent to password expiration, managing service account tokens and user access policies can achieve similar security outcomes.
title: 3_5_6: 3.5.6 Disable identifiers after a defined period of inactivity
